backend/main.mo: Main actor for the service desk app implementing CRUD operations for user profiles, clients, jobs, and labor rates with role-based access control enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the Actor state shape for migration purposes and exports a no-op `run` function that passes the old state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities import with OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all app routes (dashboard, clients, jobs, invoice, calendar, inventory, settings, login, profile-setup) and exports the RouterProvider-wrapped App component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs; handles auth-based redirects to login or profile-setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP actor, initializes access control with an optional admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, roles, clients, and jobs using the actor and identity context.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including light/dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs per day with status indicators, client info, and Google Maps links, supporting week navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a client record, with fields for name, phone, address, email, notes, and Google review URL, plus delete support.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Lists all clients with search filtering and displays each as a card showing name, phone, address, and Google review link with navigation to detail/edit.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying job/client metrics, recent jobs list, and labor rates summary, with role-based visibility for admin-only sections.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Placeholder inventory page showing parts count and low-stock metrics with search UI; backend inventory endpoint is not yet implemented so the parts list is empty.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Invoice preview page that fetches job, client, and labor rate data to render a formatted HTML invoice with download/share options.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Job create/edit form page supporting CRUD operations on jobs, including status updates and deletion, with client selection and waiver/package fields.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Jobs list page that groups jobs by status (Open, In Progress, Complete) and displays them as cards with client names and dates, with a button to create new jobs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the dashboard on success and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: A profile setup page that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation before navigating to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: An admin-only settings page that provides UI for assigning user roles and managing labor rates (create, edit, delete), with access denied shown to non-admins.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and fade/accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the ICP/Motoko + React service desk app architecture, owner principal, existing features, known issues, and incremental build strategy for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC.
